data.title: Public Companies Hold Over 1 Million BTC, Strategy Leads
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from BitcoinTreasuries.Net reveals that publicly traded companies collectively own more than 1 million Bitcoin (BTC). Strategy holds the largest share, with 636,505 BTC, ranking first among these companies.

data.title: Gate Wallet BountyDrop Launches Tea-Fi Airdrop Event
data.description: According to an official announcement, Gate Wallet's BountyDrop program has launched the Tea-Fi airdrop event. Users can access the BountyDrop section on the Gate Wallet app's "Discover" page to participate in tasks and complete them for a chance to win rewards. BountyDrop is a dedicated coin-earning activity section within Gate Wallet's "Discover" page. By completing simple tasks, users have a chance to win rewards or participate in a lottery to receive airdrop tokens. Additionally, Gate Wallet has launched the Crazy Thursday Dog Trading Competition. Users can download the Gate app, create a wallet, and complete tasks for a chance to win rewards, with a total prize pool of 20,000 USDT. Gate FomoX has released SP 17 and launched an early bird trial. Submitting product experience feedback will earn you up to 200 USDT. Gate Wallet is an industry-leading multi-chain crypto wallet, connecting to over 100 public chains, millions of assets, and tens of thousands of DApps in one place, enabling a professional-grade Web 3 experience and providing the optimal solution for every Web 3 need.

data.title: Pendle's Total Value Locked Surpasses $110 Billion
data.description: According to Foresight News, Pendle co-founder TN Lee announced that the total value locked (TVL) in Pendle has exceeded $110 billion. This marks a significant increase from two weeks ago when Pendle's TVL reached $100 billion.

data.title: Trouble for Bitcoin as this pattern hints at upcoming BTC big correction
data.description:
As Bitcoin (BTC) strives to hold the $110,000 support zone, technical indicators are painting a grim picture, with the asset facing renewed selling pressure after failing to break through a key resistance area. An outlook shared by pseudonymous cryptocurrency analyst BitBull in an X post on September 4 indicated that Bitcoin was rejected from the $114,000 resistance zone on the daily chart, a level that has now turned into a strong supply area. Bitcoin price analysis chart. Source: BitBull The analysis highlighted how BTC attempted to rally back into the $114,000 region but was pushed lower, confirming the level as a ceiling for price action
source: https://finbold.com/trouble-for-bitcoin-as-this-pattern-hints-at-upcoming-btc-big-correction/

data.title: Ethereum's newly staked amount has surpassed the amount of withdrawals, recently reaching a new high since September 2023
data.description: According to data from the Ethereum Validator website, the Ethereum PoS network's staking queue has surpassed the exit queue today. The current staking queue stands at 833,000 tokens, valued at approximately $3.66 billion, while the exit queue stands at 823,000 tokens, valued at approximately $3.62 billion. Notably, staking demand for new validators activating on the Ethereum PoS network has surged, reaching a high of 860,000 tokens on September 2nd, the highest level since September 2023.

data.title: Market News: American Bitcoin expands Bitcoin mining operations from 10 EH/s to 24 EH/s
data.description: According to market news, American Bitcoin has expanded its Bitcoin mining operations from 10 EH/s to 24 EH/s, a 2.4-fold increase. (Jinshi)

data.title: Yunfeng Financial's Stock Rises Amid Significant ETH Investment
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Yunfeng Financial, a company associated with Jack Ma, recently purchased 10,000 ETH at an average price of $4,400. This move has led to a more than 6% increase in Yunfeng Financial's stock on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange, drawing significant attention from the market. Industry experts note that as the crypto market recovers and institutional investors continue to make strategic moves, Yunfeng Financial's substantial holdings have a notable impact on market sentiment and price trends.

Yunfeng Financial is not only focused on the spot market but is also actively investing in digital asset derivatives and blockchain payment applications as part of its long-term strategy in the digital finance sector. Investors can gain insights into institutional strategies and risk management in the crypto market, which can inform their own investment decisions.

data.title: Binance Alpha GATA Airdrop Distributed
data.description: Binance announced on X that the Binance Alpha Gata (GATA) airdrop has been distributed, and token listing and trading time will start soon.

data.title: Bitget launches the 47th on-chain trading competition with a total prize pool of 20,000 BGB
data.description: Bitget's 47th on-chain trading competition is about to begin, with a total prize pool of 20,000 BGB. During the event, users trading USELESS, ARIA, and ULTI tokens will receive airdrops ranging from 20 to 200 BGB. The event runs from 7:00:00 PM on September 4th to 6:59:59 PM on September 8th (UTC+8). Additionally, Solana's MEME tokens, Pikachu and Satoshi, are now available for on-chain trading. Users can start trading in the on-chain trading section.

data.title: Tom Lee Predicts September Market Upswing Amid Fed Rate Cuts
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, BitMine Chairman Tom Lee expressed in a Macro Minute video that despite widespread market concerns over potential declines in September due to seasonal factors and a possible rise in the VIX, the best course of action would be for the Federal Reserve to maintain its current stance and begin cutting interest rates in September. This move is expected to benefit the stock market.

Throughout this year, the Federal Reserve has largely refrained from raising interest rates. It is anticipated that the Fed will start reducing rates in September, similar to the scenarios in 1998 and 2024. In both instances, the market experienced a robust rebound, particularly towards the end of the year. Consequently, Tom Lee offers a contrarian view against the prevailing market sentiment, suggesting that September 2025 might see an upward market trend.
